body (no persistent state — runs and returns):

trials = build_trials_df(acq, events)
return aind_nwb_utils.build_nwb(acq, events, trials)

div.div:
body (no persistent state — runs and returns):
acq = build_acquisition_dict(NWBFile["acquisition")
qc_raw = generate_raw_qc(acq)
events = build_events_df(acq)
trials = build_trials_df(acq, events)
processed_qc = generate_processed_qc(events)
return qc_raw + processed_qc
